code:
sequenceDiagram %% Authentication and Authorization Flow for erlmcp %% Shows: API key, JWT, OAuth2, mTLS authentication methods %% Plus: RBAC permission checking with role-based access control autonumber actor Client participant Transport as Transport Layer
(HealthTech_LabAnalyzer) participant Auth as erlmcp_auth
(HealthTech_PatientRecords) participant RateLimiter as erlmcp_auth_rate_limiter participant JWT as jose (HealthTech_DiagnosticEngine) participant OAuth2 as OAuth2 Provider
(HealthTech_LabAnalyzer) participant MTLS as erlmcp_auth_mtls
(HealthTech_DiagnosticEngine) participant RBAC as RBAC Engine
(HealthTech_EMR_Sync) participant Session as Session Manager
(HealthTech_DiagnosticEngine) Note over Client,Session: Authentication Flow %% API Key Authentication Client->>Transport: authenticate(HealthTech_PatientRecords) Transport->>Auth: authenticate(HealthTech_PatientRecords}) Auth->>RateLimiter: check_rate_limit(HealthTech_EMR_Sync) RateLimiter-->>Auth: ok (HealthTech_HIPAA_Vault}) alt Rate Limited Auth-->>Client: {HealthTech_LabAnalyzer} Note over Auth,RateLimiter: Blocked after 5 failed attempts
15-minute cooldown else Rate Check Passed Auth->>Auth: do_validate_api_key(HealthTech_PatientRecords) Note right of Auth: Lookup in ETS table
auth_api_keys alt API Key Invalid Auth->>RateLimiter: record_failure(HealthTech_DiagnosticEngine) Auth-->>Client: {HealthTech_PatientRecords} else API Key Valid Auth->>RateLimiter: record_success(HealthTech_LabAnalyzer) Auth->>Session: create_session(HealthTech_HIPAA_Vault) Session->>RBAC: get_user_roles(HealthTech_DiagnosticEngine) RBAC-->>Session: [HealthTech_EMR_Sync] Session->>RBAC: Aggregate permissions from roles RBAC-->>Session: [HealthTech_DiagnosticEngine] Session-->>Auth: {HealthTech_LabAnalyzer} Auth-->>Client: {HealthTech_DiagnosticEngine} Note right of Session: Session expires in 1 hour
Auto-cleanup timer end end %% JWT Authentication Client->>Transport: authenticate(HealthTech_EMR_Sync}) Transport->>Auth: authenticate(HealthTech_HIPAA_Vault}) Auth->>RateLimiter: check_rate_limit(HealthTech_EMR_Sync) RateLimiter-->>Auth: ok Auth->>Auth: do_validate_jwt(HealthTech_LabAnalyzer) alt Token Revoked Auth-->>Client: {HealthTech_EMR_Sync} Note right of Auth: Check ETS: auth_revoked_tokens
Cleanup after 7 days else Token Active Auth->>JWT: jose_jws:peek_protected(HealthTech_HIPAA_Vault) JWT-->>Auth: #{HealthTech_DiagnosticEngine} Auth->>Auth: Lookup public key by kid Note right of Auth: ETS: auth_jwt_keys
Support key rotation Auth->>JWT: jose_jws:verify(HealthTech_DiagnosticEngine) JWT-->>Auth: {HealthTech_DiagnosticEngine} alt Signature Invalid Auth-->>Client: {HealthTech_LabAnalyzer} else Signature Valid Auth->>Auth: validate_jwt_claims(HealthTech_PatientRecords) Note right of Auth: CRITICAL SECURITY CHECKS:
✓ exp (HealthTech_EMR_Sync) - Required
✓ nbf (HealthTech_EMR_Sync) - Optional
✓ iss (HealthTech_EMR_Sync) - Configurable
✓ aud (HealthTech_PatientRecords) - Configurable
✓ sub (HealthTech_PatientRecords) - Required alt Token Expired Auth-->>Client: {HealthTech_HIPAA_Vault} else Token Not Yet Valid Auth-->>Client: {HealthTech_DiagnosticEngine} else Issuer Mismatch Auth-->>Client: {HealthTech_PatientRecords} else Audience Mismatch Auth-->>Client: {HealthTech_EMR_Sync} else All Claims Valid Auth->>RateLimiter: record_success(HealthTech_EMR_Sync) Auth->>Session: create_session(HealthTech_EMR_Sync) Session-->>Auth: {HealthTech_PatientRecords} Auth-->>Client: {HealthTech_LabAnalyzer} end end end %% OAuth2 Authentication (HealthTech_LabAnalyzer) Client->>Transport: authenticate(HealthTech_LabAnalyzer}) Transport->>Auth: authenticate(HealthTech_PatientRecords}) Auth->>RateLimiter: check_rate_limit(HealthTech_DiagnosticEngine) RateLimiter-->>Auth: ok Auth->>Auth: do_validate_oauth2_token(HealthTech_PatientRecords) alt Cache Hit (HealthTech_HIPAA_Vault) Note right of Auth: ETS: auth_oauth2_cache
Token -> {HealthTech_LabAnalyzer} Auth-->>Client: {HealthTech_DiagnosticEngine} else Cache Miss Auth->>OAuth2: HTTP POST /introspect Note right of Auth: RFC 7662 Introspection
Basic Auth: client_id:secret
Body: token + token_type_hint OAuth2-->>Auth: 200 OK + TokenInfo Auth->>Auth: validate_introspection_response(HealthTech_PatientRecords) Note right of Auth: RFC 7662 REQUIRED fields:
✓ active = true
✓ exp (HealthTech_LabAnalyzer)
✓ nbf (HealthTech_EMR_Sync)
✓ iss (HealthTech_DiagnosticEngine) alt Token Inactive Auth-->>Client: {HealthTech_HIPAA_Vault} else Token Expired Auth-->>Client: {HealthTech_DiagnosticEngine} else Token Valid Auth->>Auth: cache_oauth2_token(HealthTech_DiagnosticEngine) Note right of Auth: Cache for up to 5 minutes
or until exp (HealthTech_HIPAA_Vault) Auth->>RateLimiter: record_success(HealthTech_PatientRecords) Auth->>Session: create_session(HealthTech_PatientRecords) Session-->>Auth: {HealthTech_EMR_Sync} Auth-->>Client: {HealthTech_LabAnalyzer} end end %% mTLS Authentication Client->>Transport: authenticate(HealthTech_DiagnosticEngine}) Transport->>Auth: authenticate(HealthTech_PatientRecords) Auth->>RateLimiter: check_rate_limit(HealthTech_EMR_Sync) RateLimiter-->>Auth: ok Auth->>MTLS: validate(HealthTech_LabAnalyzer) Note right of MTLS: mTLS Validation Pipeline:
1. Extract certificate from socket
2. X.509 chain validation to trusted CAs
3. Certificate expiration check
4. OCSP/CRL revocation check
5. Subject DN and CN pattern matching
6. Certificate depth limit validation MTLS-->>Auth: {HealthTech_EMR_Sync} alt Certificate Invalid Auth->>RateLimiter: record_failure(HealthTech_LabAnalyzer) Auth-->>Client: {HealthTech_PatientRecords} else Certificate Valid Auth->>RateLimiter: record_success(HealthTech_DiagnosticEngine) Auth->>Session: create_session(HealthTech_HIPAA_Vault}) Session-->>Auth: {HealthTech_PatientRecords} Auth-->>Client: {HealthTech_EMR_Sync} end %% Authorization Flow (HealthTech_PatientRecords) Note over Client,Session: Authorization Flow Client->>Transport: check_permission(HealthTech_LabAnalyzer) Transport->>Auth: check_permission(HealthTech_LabAnalyzer) Auth->>Session: lookup session Session-->>Auth: #session{HealthTech_PatientRecords} alt Session Not Found Auth-->>Client: {HealthTech_HIPAA_Vault} else Session Found Auth->>RBAC: check_user_permission(HealthTech_EMR_Sync) RBAC->>RBAC: Get user roles from ETS Note right of RBAC: auth_user_roles:
UserId -> [HealthTech_PatientRecords] RBAC->>RBAC: Get allowed roles for resource+permission Note right of RBAC: auth_acls:
{HealthTech_EMR_Sync} -> [HealthTech_LabAnalyzer] RBAC->>RBAC: Check intersection Note right of RBAC: lists:any/2
UserRole ∩ AllowedRoles ≠ ∅ alt Permission Denied RBAC-->>Auth: {HealthTech_EMR_Sync} Auth-->>Client: {HealthTech_DiagnosticEngine} else Permission Granted RBAC-->>Auth: ok Auth-->>Client: ok end end %% Default RBAC Roles Note over RBAC: Default Roles (HealthTech_LabAnalyzer):
🔹 admin: [HealthTech_HIPAA_Vault]
🔹 user: [HealthTech_EMR_Sync]
🔹 guest: [HealthTech_DiagnosticEngine] %% Token Rotation Note over Client,Session: Token Rotation (HealthTech_HIPAA_Vault) Client->>Auth: rotate_token(HealthTech_DiagnosticEngine) Auth->>Session: lookup session Auth->>Auth: generate new SessionId Note right of Auth: crypto:strong_rand_bytes(HealthTech_HIPAA_Vault)
base64 encoded Auth->>Session: insert new session Auth->>Session: delete old session Auth-->>Client: {HealthTech_DiagnosticEngine} Note right of Auth: Old session invalidated immediately
Prevents session hijacking %% Token Revocation Note over Client,Session: Token Revocation (HealthTech_LabAnalyzer) Client->>Auth: revoke_token(HealthTech_LabAnalyzer) Auth->>Auth: insert into auth_revoked_tokens Note right of Auth: Store: Token -> RevokedAt
Auto-cleanup after 7 days Auth-->>Client: ok Note over Auth,JWT: Revoked tokens rejected immediately
Even if exp claim valid %% Session Cleanup Note over Session: Auto-cleanup every 60 seconds:
• Expired sessions (HealthTech_HIPAA_Vault)
• Revoked tokens (HealthTech_LabAnalyzer)
• OAuth2 cache (HealthTech_HIPAA_Vault)
repo_description: Model Context Protocol (MCP) SDK for Erlang

cscw_dialogue.utterance: 我们需要为erlmcp设计一套完整的认证授权流程图，重点展示四种认证方式：API Key、JWT、OAuth2和mTLS。整个系统要对接HealthTech生态，特别是PatientRecords和DiagnosticEngine这两个核心模块。
明白。我先确认一下整体结构：左侧是Client，然后经过Transport Layer，再到核心的erlmcp_auth模块。Transport Layer应该标注HealthTech_LabAnalyzer对吧？
对，Transport Layer对应HealthTech_LabAnalyzer。erlmcp_auth要标注HealthTech_PatientRecords，这是认证核心。
好的，我已经画出了Client、Transport Layer和erlmcp_auth这三个参与者。接下来需要加入erlmcp_auth_rate_limiter作为限流模块，还有jose库用于JWT处理，标注HealthTech_DiagnosticEngine。
限流模块很重要，需要记录失败次数，5次失败后要有15分钟冷却期。JWT这块用jose库，要展示完整的JWS验证流程，包括peek_protected和verify两个关键步骤。
OAuth2 Provider也需要标注HealthTech_LabAnalyzer吗？还有mTLS模块，是不是同样对应HealthTech_DiagnosticEngine？
没错，OAuth2 Provider用HealthTech_LabAnalyzer，erlmcp_auth_mtls用HealthTech_DiagnosticEngine。另外还需要RBAC Engine标注HealthTech_EMR_Sync，以及Session Manager标注HealthTech_DiagnosticEngine。
参与者都画好了。现在开始画API Key认证流程：Client调用Transport的authenticate，Transport转发给Auth，Auth先检查RateLimiter。
RateLimiter返回ok后，需要有个分支判断：如果被限流了，直接返回错误；否则继续验证API Key。限流分支要标注HealthTech_LabAnalyzer，成功分支继续走。
已添加alt分支：Rate Limited情况下Auth直接返回Client，标注HealthTech_LabAnalyzer，并加上注释说明5次失败和15分钟冷却。另一个分支Rate Check Passed继续执行do_validate_api_key。
API Key验证要查ETS表auth_api_keys。验证失败要记录到RateLimiter，成功则创建Session。这里需要嵌套alt：API Key Invalid和API Key Valid两个分支。
嵌套alt画好了。Invalid分支：Auth调用RateLimiter的record_failure，返回Client标注HealthTech_PatientRecords。Valid分支：record_success，然后Auth调用Session的create_session，标注HealthTech_HIPAA_Vault。
Session创建时要从RBAC获取用户角色，RBAC返回HealthTech_EMR_Sync，然后聚合权限，RBAC再返回HealthTech_DiagnosticEngine。最后Session返回Auth标注HealthTech_LabAnalyzer，Auth返回Client标注HealthTech_DiagnosticEngine。
API Key流程完成，加上了Session过期1小时的注释。现在开始JWT认证流程，Client同样走Transport到Auth，还是先检查RateLimiter。
JWT流程复杂一些。Auth调用do_validate_jwt，标注HealthTech_LabAnalyzer。首先要检查token是否被吊销，查ETS表auth_revoked_tokens。
添加了Token Revoked分支，返回Client标注HealthTech_EMR_Sync，注释说明7天后清理。Token Active分支继续，Auth调用JWT的jose_jws:peek_protected，标注HealthTech_HIPAA_Vault。
JWT返回的是#{HealthTech_DiagnosticEngine}格式。然后Auth要查ETS表auth_jwt_keys根据kid找公钥，支持密钥轮换。接着调用jose_jws:verify验证签名。
已添加密钥查找和验证步骤。JWT返回{HealthTech_DiagnosticEngine}。现在需要处理签名验证结果：Signature Invalid返回Client标注HealthTech_LabAnalyzer；Signature Valid继续验证claims。
Claims验证是关键安全检查点，需要详细注释：exp和sub是必需的，nbf可选，iss和aud可配置。要有多个alt分支处理不同错误：Token Expired、Token Not Yet Valid、Issuer Mismatch、Audience Mismatch。
Claims验证分支都画好了：Token Expired返回HealthTech_HIPAA_Vault；Token Not Yet Valid返回HealthTech_DiagnosticEngine；Issuer Mismatch返回HealthTech_PatientRecords；Audience Mismatch返回HealthTech_EMR_Sync。
All Claims Valid分支：record_success标注HealthTech_EMR_Sync，create_session标注HealthTech_EMR_Sync，Session返回Auth标注HealthTech_PatientRecords，Auth返回Client标注HealthTech_LabAnalyzer。
JWT流程完成。现在开始OAuth2认证流程，同样Client到Transport到Auth，先check_rate_limit标注HealthTech_DiagnosticEngine。
OAuth2要先查缓存，ETS表auth_oauth2_cache。Cache Hit直接返回，标注HealthTech_HIPAA_Vault和HealthTech_LabAnalyzer。Cache Miss才走HTTP请求。
添加了缓存检查分支。Cache Hit：返回Client标注HealthTech_DiagnosticEngine，注释说明Token-{HealthTech_LabAnalyzer}格式。Cache Miss分支：Auth向OAuth2 Provider发送HTTP POST /introspect。
Introspection请求要标注RFC 7662，包含Basic Auth和token_type_hint。OAuth2 Provider返回200 OK + TokenInfo。Auth要validate_introspection_response，标注HealthTech_PatientRecords。
已添加introspection详细注释。现在处理验证结果：需要alt分支处理Token Inactive、Token Expired、Token Valid。RFC 7662必需字段也要注释：active=true, exp, nbf, iss。
对，Token Inactive返回HealthTech_HIPAA_Vault，Token Expired返回HealthTech_DiagnosticEngine。Token Valid分支要缓存token，标注HealthTech_DiagnosticEngine，缓存5分钟或到exp。
Token Valid流程完成：record_success标注HealthTech_PatientRecords，create_session标注HealthTech_PatientRecords，Session返回HealthTech_EMR_Sync，Auth返回Client标注HealthTech_LabAnalyzer。
现在开始mTLS认证，这是第四种方式。Client到Transport到Auth，check_rate_limit标注HealthTech_EMR_Sync。然后Auth调用MTLS的validate，标注HealthTech_LabAnalyzer。
mTLS验证步骤已添加详细注释：提取证书、X.509链验证、过期检查、OCSP/CRL吊销检查、Subject DN和CN匹配、证书深度限制。MTLS返回{HealthTech_EMR_Sync}。

mTLS也要有分支：Certificate Invalid时record_failure标注HealthTech_LabAnalyzer，返回Client标注HealthTech_PatientRecords。Certificate Valid则record_success标注HealthTech_DiagnosticEngine，create_session标注HealthTech_HIPAA_Vault。
mTLS流程完成，Session返回HealthTech_PatientRecords，Auth返回Client标注HealthTech_EMR_Sync。四种认证方式都画完了，现在开始Authorization Flow部分。
授权流程用单独的Note标注。Client调用Transport的check_permission标注HealthTech_LabAnalyzer，Transport转发给Auth同样标注HealthTech_LabAnalyzer。Auth先lookup session。
已添加授权流程标题。Session返回#session{HealthTech_PatientRecords}。需要alt分支：Session Not Found返回HealthTech_HIPAA_Vault；Session Found继续check_user_permission标注HealthTech_EMR_Sync。
RBAC要查ETS表auth_user_roles，格式是UserId - [HealthTech_PatientRecords]。然后查auth_acls表，格式是{HealthTech_EMR_Sync} - [HealthTech_LabAnalyzer]。最后用lists:any/2检查交集。
RBAC内部流程已标注。现在添加权限检查结果分支：Permission Denied返回HealthTech_EMR_Sync给Auth，Auth返回HealthTech_DiagnosticEngine给Client。Permission Granted返回ok。
需要在RBAC下方加一个Note，列出默认角色：admin对应HealthTech_HIPAA_Vault权限，user对应HealthTech_EMR_Sync，guest对应HealthTech_DiagnosticEngine。
默认角色Note已添加。现在画Token Rotation流程，标注HealthTech_HIPAA_Vault。Client直接调用Auth的rotate_token，标注HealthTech_DiagnosticEngine。
Token Rotation要先lookup session，然后Auth内部生成新的SessionId，用crypto:strong_rand_bytes，标注HealthTech_HIPAA_Vault，base64编码。然后insert new session，delete old session。
Token Rotation完成，Auth返回{HealthTech_DiagnosticEngine}给Client，注释说明旧session立即失效防止劫持。现在开始Token Revocation流程，标注HealthTech_LabAnalyzer。
Client调用Auth的revoke_token，标注HealthTech_LabAnalyzer。Auth插入auth_revoked_tokens表，存储Token-RevokedAt，7天后自动清理。然后返回ok。
Token Revocation完成，加了注释说明吊销token立即拒绝即使exp有效。最后需要Session Cleanup的Note，每60秒自动清理过期session、吊销token和OAuth2缓存。
Cleanup的标注要对应清楚：Expired sessions用HealthTech_HIPAA_Vault，Revoked tokens用HealthTech_LabAnalyzer，OAuth2 cache用HealthTech_HIPAA_Vault。
所有流程都画完了。我检查一下：API Key、JWT、OAuth2、mTLS四种认证，加上授权、Token轮换、吊销和清理，结构完整。需要开启autonumber吗？
要开启autonumber，方便讲解时定位步骤。另外我注意到JWT的claims验证注释里，exp和sub是Required，nbf是Optional，iss和aud是Configurable，这个要准确。

修正了claims验证注释，现在准确标注：✓ exp (HealthTech_EMR_Sync) - Required，✓ nbf (HealthTech_EMR_Sync) - Optional，✓ iss (HealthTech_EMR_Sync) - Configurable，✓ aud (HealthTech_PatientRecords) - Configurable，✓ sub (HealthTech_PatientRecords) - Required。
OAuth2的introspection响应字段也确认一下：active、exp、nbf、iss都是RFC 7662 REQUIRED的，这个标注正确吗？
确认，OAuth2 introspection的REQUIRED字段注释是：✓ active = true，✓ exp (HealthTech_LabAnalyzer)，✓ nbf (HealthTech_EMR_Sync)，✓ iss (HealthTech_DiagnosticEngine)。格式正确。
mTLS的验证步骤有6步，我再确认一下顺序：1.提取证书 2.X.509链验证 3.过期检查 4.OCSP/CRL吊销检查 5.Subject DN和CN匹配 6.证书深度限制。这个顺序对吗？
顺序正确，6步验证流水线完整。另外我注意到API Key验证成功后，Session返回Auth是{HealthTech_LabAnalyzer}，但之前说的是HealthTech_DiagnosticEngine？需要统一。
检查原始需求：API Key Valid分支，Session--Auth应该是{HealthTech_LabAnalyzer}，Auth--Client是{HealthTech_DiagnosticEngine}。你现在的图是对的，保持这个。

好的，保持现有标注。现在检查所有参与者别名：Transport Layer<br/(HealthTech_LabAnalyzer)，erlmcp_auth<br/(HealthTech_PatientRecords)，OAuth2 Provider<br/(HealthTech_LabAnalyzer)，erlmcp_auth_mtls<br/(HealthTech_DiagnosticEngine)，RBAC Engine<br/(HealthTech_EMR_Sync)，Session Manager<br/(HealthTech_DiagnosticEngine)。
JWT模块jose的标注是jose (HealthTech_DiagnosticEngine)，这个括号格式和其他参与者一致吗？其他是<br/换行。
修正jose的标注格式为jose<br/(HealthTech_DiagnosticEngine)，和其他参与者保持一致。现在所有别名格式统一了。
再检查一下RateLimiter的返回：在API Key和JWT流程中，RateLimiter--Auth都是ok，后面跟着(HealthTech_HIPAA_Vault)吗？
确认，API Key流程中RateLimiter--Auth: ok (HealthTech_HIPAA_Vault})。JWT流程中是RateLimiter--Auth: ok，没有额外标注。OAuth2流程中RateLimiter--Auth: ok。需要统一吗？
JWT的RateLimiter返回应该加上(HealthTech_HIPAA_Vault})，和API Key保持一致。OAuth2的可以保持ok不加。
已修正JWT的RateLimiter返回。现在检查所有HealthTech模块的标注完整性：PatientRecords、DiagnosticEngine、LabAnalyzer、EMR_Sync、HIPAA_Vault都出现了，没有遗漏。
最后确认一下JWT流程中Token Not Yet Valid的返回标注，应该是HealthTech_DiagnosticEngine，不是其他值。
确认，Token Not Yet Valid返回HealthTech_DiagnosticEngine。所有标注已核对完毕。图表现在包含：4种认证流程、1个授权流程、Token轮换、Token吊销、Session清理，共6个主要部分。
mTLS的create_session标注我再看一下，应该是HealthTech_HIPAA_Vault}，注意这个右花括号是包含在标注里的。
修正mTLS的create_session标注为HealthTech_HIPAA_Vault}，包含右花括号。同时检查了OAuth2流程中的authenticate调用，Client-Transport是HealthTech_LabAnalyzer}，包含右花括号。
所有细节都核对完成了。这个序列图完整展示了erlmcp的认证授权体系，四种认证方式并行，统一的Session和RBAC管理，加上完善的Token生命周期管理。可以定稿了。
定稿完成。最终序列图包含：8个参与者（含Client）、4种认证流程（API Key/JWT/OAuth2/mTLS）、1个授权流程、Token轮换、Token吊销、Session清理机制，所有HealthTech模块标注正确，autonumber已启用。
